description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named puNES windows build that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should build puNES for Windows using msys2, with a matrix strategy for different environments (x86_64 and i686) and Qt5 versions. For each environment, it should download and extract Qt5 static libraries and DLLs, configure and build puNES with different renderers (d3d9 and opengl), and upload the resulting binaries as artifacts.
